description: The BTS Official Light Stick Ver.4 (ARMY Bomb) is the latest evolution of BTS’s iconic concert light stick. Featuring a sleek transparent globe, refined detailing, and upgraded Bluetooth capabilities. Perfect for concerts, events, and collectors, it is an essential item for every ARMY.
name: BTS OFFICIAL LIGHT STICK VER. 4 (ARMY BOMB)

description: The BTS Photocards are premium collectible photo prints featuring the members of BTS in a variety of official concepts, poses, and eras. Designed for fans and collectors, these photocards showcase high-quality imagery and refined finishing, making them perfect for display, trading, or completing your BTS merchandise collection. (10 pcs each member)
name: BTS PHOTOCARDS

description: BTS – Proof is a special anthology album celebrating BTS’s journey and artistic legacy. This collector’s edition features curated tracks from their career alongside exclusive concept materials, premium packaging, and official inclusions designed for dedicated ARMY collectors.
name: BTS – Proof (Standard Edition Album)

description: The BTS-inspired BT21 Characters Keychain is a fan-made K-pop accessory featuring cute BT21-style character designs loved by fans worldwide. This keychain combines playful aesthetics with durable materials, making it a stylish collectible for bags, keys, or display.
name: BTS-Inspired BT21 Characters Keychain
